etymology.description: 生(生) (shēng, "life") + 屯(屯) (tún, "barracks") = phonetic and semantic elements combined
etymology.interpretation: The character 甡 uses 生(生) (shēng, "life") for its phonetic contribution and 屯(屯) (tún, "barracks") serves as the semantic indicator, suggesting something associated with domestic life or maintenance, such as a broom.
